languages.text: {n}Помедлив, Себериан достает вокс и командует:{/n} "Немедленно возьмите капитана Зауэрбэка под стражу".

traits.locale_text: {n}Помедлив, Себериан достает вокс и командует:{/n} "Немедленно возьмите капитана Зауэрбэка под стражу".

languages.text: {n}After a moment's hesitation, Seberian reaches for his vox and commands:{/n} "Take Captain Sauerback into custody immediately."
languages.original_text: {n}Помедлив, Себериан достает вокс и командует:{/n} "Немедленно возьмите капитана Зауэрбэка под стражу".

traits.locale_text: {n}After a moment's hesitation, Seberian reaches for his vox and commands:{/n} "Take Captain Sauerback into custody immediately."

{n}After a moment's hesitation, Seberian reaches for his vox and commands:{/n} "Take Captain Sauerback into custody immediately."

languages.text: {n}Nach kurzem Zögern greift Seberian nach seinem Vox und befiehlt:{/n} "Nehmt Captain Sauerback umgehend in Gewahrsam."
languages.original_text: {n}After a moment's hesitation, Seberian reaches for his vox and commands:{/n} "Take Captain Sauerback into custody immediately."

traits.locale_text: {n}Nach kurzem Zögern greift Seberian nach seinem Vox und befiehlt:{/n} "Nehmt Captain Sauerback umgehend in Gewahrsam."

languages.text: {n}犹豫片刻后，塞贝里安拿起音阵下令道：{/n}“立刻逮捕苏尔贝克上尉。”
languages.original_text: {n}After a moment's hesitation, Seberian reaches for his vox and commands:{/n} "Take Captain Sauerback into custody immediately."

traits.locale_text: {n}犹豫片刻后，塞贝里安拿起音阵下令道：{/n}“立刻逮捕苏尔贝克上尉。”

languages.text: {n}Après un instant d'hésitation, Seberian donne un ordre à travers son vox :{/n} « Procédez à l'arrestation immédiate du capitaine Sauerback. »
languages.original_text: {n}After a moment's hesitation, Seberian reaches for his vox and commands:{/n} "Take Captain Sauerback into custody immediately."

traits.locale_text: {n}Après un instant d'hésitation, Seberian donne un ordre à travers son vox :{/n} « Procédez à l'arrestation immédiate du capitaine Sauerback. »

languages.text: {n}Tras un instante de duda, Seberian se lleva la mano al vocotransmisor e imparte una orden:{/n} «Arrestad inmediatamente al capitán Sauerback».
languages.original_text: {n}After a moment's hesitation, Seberian reaches for his vox and commands:{/n} "Take Captain Sauerback into custody immediately."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tras un instante de duda, Seberian se lleva la mano al vocotransmisor e imparte una orden:{/n} «Arrestad inmediatamente al capitán Sauerback».

languages.text: {n}Bir anlık tereddütten sonra Seberian, voksuna uzanıp emrediyor.{/n} "Yüzbaşı Sauerback'i derhâl gözaltına alın."
languages.original_text: {n}After a moment's hesitation, Seberian reaches for his vox and commands:{/n} "Take Captain Sauerback into custody immediately."

traits.locale_text: {n}Bir anlık tereddütten sonra Seberian, voksuna uzanıp emrediyor.{/n} "Yüzbaşı Sauerback'i derhâl gözaltına alın."

languages.text:
{n}セベリアンは一瞬躊躇した後、自分のボイスを手に取り、命令を下す。{/n}
「サウアーバック大佐を直ちに拘束せよ。」
languages.original_text: {n}After a moment's hesitation, Seberian reaches for his vox and commands:{/n} "Take Captain Sauerback into custody immediately."

traits.locale_text:
{n}セベリアンは一瞬躊躇した後、自分のボイスを手に取り、命令を下す。{/n}
「サウアーバック大佐を直ちに拘束せよ。」
